mapper.select: select id, code, type, name from train order by id asc
mapper.insert: insert into train (name, code, type, status, first_class_carriages_num, first_class_carriages_list_num, second_class_carriages_num, second_class_carriages_list_num, created_time, created_by, updated_time, updated_by) values (#{name}, #{code}, #{type}, #{status}, #{firstClassCarriagesNum}, #{firstClassCarriagesListNum}, #{secondClassCarriagesNum}, #{secondClassCarriagesListNum}, now(), #{createBy}, now(), #{updateBy})
mapper.select: select count(1) from ticket where train_id = #{trainId}
